title: A Map of Every Mourning
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: In a coastal Andalusian town where each resident's grief manifests as a visible weather pattern above their head, a young widow whose perpetual drought threatens the town's crops must convince a man carrying a hurricane to let her into his storm.
long_description: In a coastal Andalusian town where each resident's grief manifests as a visible weather pattern above their head, a young widow whose perpetual drought threatens the town's crops must convince a man carrying a hurricane to let her into his storm.
